# Test AWS Knowledge Base server performance under stress

env MCP_ULTRA_TIMEOUT=25ms
env MCP_EXTREME_TIMEOUT=100ms

# Performance test - rapid initialize calls
exec timeout 3s go run . &
pid=$!
sleep 1

# Rapid fire multiple initialize calls
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":1,"method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{},"clientInfo":{"name":"perf-test","version":"1.0.0"}}}' | timeout 2s go run .
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":2,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | timeout 2s go run .
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":3,"method":"ping","params":{}}' | timeout 2s go run .

# Test rapid tool listing
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":4,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | timeout 1s go run .
exec echo '{"jsonrpc":"2.0","id":5,"method":"tools/list","params":{}}' | timeout 1s go run .

# Clean up
exec kill $pid || true
